verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ الٓر ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَقُرْءَانٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: Alif Lām Rā’. Those are the signs of the Book and a clear Qur’ān.

verses.quran_arabic: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: Perhaps those who disbelieve (will) wish, if they had submitted [. . .].

verses.quran_arabic: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا۟ وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ وَيُلْهِهِمُ ٱلْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Leave them (to) eat and enjoy (themselves), and (let their) hope divert them. Soon they will know!

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌۭ مَّعْلُومٌۭ
verses.text: We have not destroyed any town without its having a known decree.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ
verses.text: No community precedes its time, nor do they delay (it).

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِى نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.text: They have said: ‘You on whom the Reminder has been sent down! Surely you are possessed indeed!

verses.quran_arabic: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Why do you not bring the angels to us, if you are one of the truthful?’

verses.quran_arabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓا۟ إِذًۭا مُّنظَرِينَ
verses.text: We only send down the angels with the truth, and then they will not be spared.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ  إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تُنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا نُنَزِّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: We bestow not the angels from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَآ تَّنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تَنَزَّلُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُواْ إِذٗا مُّنظَرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّۖ وَمَا كَانُواْ إِذاٗ مُّنظَرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَا تَنَزَّلُ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّۖ وَمَا كَانُوٓاْ إِذاٗ مُّنظَرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: The angels are not bestowed from on high except with the truth, and in no way would they then be respited.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا ٱلذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُۥ لَحَٰفِظُونَ
verses.text: Surely We have sent down the Reminder, and surely We are indeed its Watchers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى شِيَعِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We sent (messengers) before you among the parties of old,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: yet not one messenger came to them whom they did not mock.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُۥ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: In this way We put it into the hearts of the sinners –

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: they do not believe in it, though the customary way of those of old has already passed away.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَظَلُّوا۟ فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
verses.text: (Even) if We opened on them a gate of the sky, and they were going up through it continually,

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَٰرُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌۭ مَّسْحُورُونَ
verses.text: they would (still) indeed say, ‘Our sight is bewildered! No! We are a bewitched people!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًۭا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We have made constellations in the sky, and made it appear enticing for the onlookers,

verses.quran_arabic: وَحَفِظْنَٰهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَٰنٍۢ رَّجِيمٍ
verses.text: and protected it from every accursed satan

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَرَقَ ٱلسَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: –except any who (may) steal in to overhear, then a clear flame pursues him.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ مَّوْزُونٍۢ
verses.text: And the earth – We stretched it out, and cast on it firm mountains, and caused everything (that is) weighed to sprout in it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَٰيِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُۥ بِرَٰزِقِينَ
verses.text: We have made for you a means of living on it, and (for those creatures) for which you are not providers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن مِّن شَىْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَآئِنُهُۥ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
verses.text: The storehouses of everything are only with Us, and We send it down only in a known measure.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَا ٱلرِّيَٰحَ لَوَٰقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُمُوهُ وَمَآ أَنتُمْ لَهُۥ بِخَٰزِنِينَ
verses.text: We send the fertilizing winds, and We send down water from the sky and give it to you to drink. You are not the storekeepers of it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ ٱلْوَٰرِثُونَ
verses.text: Surely We – We indeed give life and cause death, and We are the inheritors.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا ٱلْمُسْتَـْٔخِرِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We know the ones who press forward among you, and certainly We know the ones who lag behind.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely your Lord – He will gather them. Surely He is wise, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We created the human from dry clay, from molded mud,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْجَآنَّ خَلَقْنَٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.text: and the (ancestor of the) jinn, We created him before (that) from scorching fire.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًۭا مِّن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels: ‘Surely I am going to create a human being from dry clay, from molded mud.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: When I have fashioned him, and breathed some of My spirit into him, fall down before him in prostration.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: So the angels prostrated themselves – all of them together

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: – except Iblīs. He refused to be with the ones who prostrated themselves.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Iblīs! What is (the matter) with you that you are not with the ones who prostrated themselves?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ مِّنْ حَمَإٍۢ مَّسْنُونٍۢ
verses.text: He said, ‘I am not (one) to prostrate myself before a human being whom you have created from dry clay, from molded mud.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He said, ‘Get out of here! Surely you are accursed!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ ٱللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Surely the curse (is going to remain) on you until the Day of Judgment.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, spare me until the Day when they are raised up.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely you are one of the spared

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.text: – until the Day of the known time.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, because You have made me err, I shall indeed make (things) appear enticing to them on the earth, and I shall indeed make them err – all (of them)

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: – except for Your devoted servants among them.’

canonical_variants.english: except for Your sincere servants among them.”
except for Your sincere servants among them.”
except for Your sincere servants among them.”
except for Your sincere servants among them.”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ عَلَىَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
verses.text: He said, ‘This is the straight path (incumbent) on Me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ عِبَادِى لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَٰنٌ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَاوِينَ
verses.text: Surely My servants – you will not have any authority over them, except for whoever follows you of the ones who are in error.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: Surely Gehenna is indeed their appointed place – all (of them).

verses.quran_arabic: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَٰبٍۢ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌۭ مَّقْسُومٌ
verses.text: It has seven gates: to each gate a part of them is assigned.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: (But) surely the ones who guard (themselves) will be in (the midst of) gardens and springs:

verses.quran_arabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.text: “Enter it in peace, secure!”

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَٰنًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: We shall strip away whatever rancor is in their hearts. (As) brothers (they will recline) on couches, facing each other.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌۭ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
verses.text: No weariness will touch them there, nor will they be expelled from it.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ نَبِّئْ عِبَادِىٓ أَنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Inform My servants that I am the Forgiving, the Compassionate,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِى هُوَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ٱلْأَلِيمُ
verses.text: and that My punishment is the painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: And inform them about the guests of Abraham:

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
verses.text: when they entered upon him, and said, ‘Peace!,’ he said, ‘Surely we are afraid of you.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
verses.text: They said, ‘Do not be afraid. Surely we give you good news of a knowing boy.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Do you give me good news, even though old age has touched me? What good news do you give me?’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُوٓنِّ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرۡتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ ٱلۡكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُوٓنِّ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِے عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ اَ۬لْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونِۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِے عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ اَ۬لْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونِۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “Have you brought me glad tidings when old age has touched me? So what glad tidings could you give me?”

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَٰنِطِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘We give you good news in truth, so do not be one of the despairing.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Who despairs of the mercy of his Lord, except for the ones who go astray?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘What is your business, you envoys?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Surely we have been sent to a people who are sinners,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: except for the house(hold) of Lot. Surely we shall indeed rescue them – all (of them)

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: – except his wife. We have determined that she indeed (will be) one of those who stay behind.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: When the envoys came to the house(hold) of Lot,

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌۭ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.text: he said, ‘Surely you are a people unknown (to me).’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘No! We have brought you what they were in doubt about.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَتَيْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: We have brought you the truth. Surely we are truthful indeed.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌۭ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.text: So journey with your family in a part of the night, but you follow behind them. Let none of you turn around, but proceed where you are commanded.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌۭ مُّصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: We decreed for him that command, that the last remnant of these (people) would be cut off in the morning.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَآءَ أَهْلُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
verses.text: The people of the city came welcoming the good news.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely these are my guests, so do not shame me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
verses.text: Guard (yourselves) against God, and do not disgrace me.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Did we not forbid you from the worlds?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ بَنَاتِىٓ إِن كُنتُمْ فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘These are my daughters, if you would do (it).’

verses.quran_arabic: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِى سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: By your life! Surely they were wandering blindly in their drunkenness.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
verses.text: So the cry seized them at sunrise.

verses.quran_arabic: فَجَعَلْنَا عَٰلِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
verses.text: We turned (the city) upside down and rained on them stones of baked clay.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that are signs indeed for the discerning.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍۢ مُّقِيمٍ
verses.text: Surely it is indeed on a (path)way (which still) exists.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Surely in that is a sign indeed for the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ لَظَٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: The people of the Grove were evildoers indeed,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: so We took vengeance on them. Surely both of them are indeed in a clear record.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْحِجْرِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: Certainly the people of al-Ḥijr called the envoys liars.

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُمْ ءَايَٰتِنَا فَكَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: We gave them Our signs, but they turned away from it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا ءَامِنِينَ
verses.text: They carved secure houses out of the mountains,

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: but the cry seized them in the morning.

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: What they had earned was of no use to them.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ لَءَاتِيَةٌۭ ۖ فَٱصْفَحِ ٱلصَّفْحَ ٱلْجَمِيلَ
verses.text: We did not create the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, except in truth. Surely the Hour is coming indeed, so excuse (them) gracefully.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ ٱلْخَلَّٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Surely your Lord – He is the Creator, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَٰكَ سَبْعًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْمَثَانِى وَٱلْقُرْءَانَ ٱلْعَظِيمَ
verses.text: Certainly We have given you seven of the oft-repeated (stories), and the great Qur’ān.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًۭا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Do not yearn after what We have given classes of them to enjoy, and do not sorrow over them, but lower your wing to the believers,

verses.quran_arabic: وَقُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱلنَّذِيرُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: and say: ‘Surely I am the clear warner.’

verses.quran_arabic: كَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
verses.text: – As We have sent (it) down on the dividers,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عِضِينَ
verses.text: those who have cut the Qur’ān (into) parts.

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْـَٔلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: By your Lord! We shall indeed question them all

verses.quran_arabic: عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: about what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
verses.text: Break forth with what you are commanded, and turn away from the idolaters.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَٰكَ ٱلْمُسْتَهْزِءِينَ
verses.text: Surely We are sufficient for you (against) the mockers,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: who set up another god with God. Soon they will know!

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We know that you – your heart is distressed by what they say.

verses.quran_arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: Glorify your Lord with praise, and be one of those who prostrate themselves,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
verses.text: and serve your Lord, until the certainty comes to you.
